creator: cdburgess75@yahoo.com
text: I cannot see any words in X. KDE or GNOME. I mean everything works fine but all the text are not characters, just bars of stuff where letters should be in X.  I figured I didnt have the fonts for X loaded but I cannot manage to load them or reload them with the sysinstall disk. Can someone tell me how to do it at the promt.  Unless it something else I overlooked. Help please!
